_README: Global trucking catalogue. All trucks live HERE (not in equipment.json) regardless of billing model. Hourly trucks have `hourly_rate`; per-load trucks have `per_load_rate`. Trucks have commercial insurance, so the 16% rental insurance surcharge never applies. DEFAULT: BMDW does the trucking in-house at $100/hr (catalogue key `in_house_trucking`) unless Michael explicitly names a contractor truck (Browns River, Upland's, Northwin).

in_house_trucking.name: In-house trucking ($100/hr)
in_house_trucking.notes: BMDW's own truck. $100/hr — flat hourly rate. DEFAULT trucking option — use this unless Michael explicitly names a contractor (Browns River / Upland's / Northwin).

tandem_dump.name: Tandem dump truck (contractor)
tandem_dump.notes: Generic contractor tandem. $170/hr. Use only when Michael says it's being subbed out and the supplier isn't Browns River.

tandem_dump_brownsriver.name: Tandem dump truck (Browns River)
tandem_dump_brownsriver.notes: $160/hr. Use when Michael says trucking is subbed to Browns River (Courtenay/Comox/Cumberland area).

truck_and_pup.name: Truck and pup
truck_and_pup.notes: ~16 yd^3 (tandem + pup trailer). $205/hr. Used for big aggregate hauls when Michael explicitly requests it.

mobilization.name: Equipment mobilization (one way)
mobilization.notes: $140 per direction. Drop-off + pick-up = 2 trips = $280. Add manually when the job needs an excavator/skid/etc. trucked in.

block_delivery.name: Block delivery (heavy haul, per load)
block_delivery.notes: Heavy-haul truck for retaining-wall blocks. 16 lock blocks per load OR 26 magnum stones per load. Same $850 either way. Compute loads = ceil(block_count / capacity).
